content.content: Post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the 'general' channel.

```python
article_content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")

if article_content is None:
    print("Could not retrieve the article at www.informations.com")
else:
    class ArticleSummary(BaseModel):
        summary: str

    result = query_ai_assistant(
        f"Summarize the following article content in a concise way suitable for posting in a Slack channel:\n\n{article_content}",
        ArticleSummary
    )

    send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
    print("Summary posted to the 'general' channel.")
```
